Brisbane commuters faced massive delays this morning following a CFMEU protest and car accident in the CBD.  A two-car crash on the Inner-City Bypass caused traffic delays on the south side of the city, with major arterial roads affected. Paramedics were called to the scene just after 7am, with one patient taken to the Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital.  This has compounded with road closures in the city, as a CFMEU protest kicked off at 8am. Starting at Queen's Gardens and ending at Parliament House, parts of George Street, Elizabeth Street and William Street have been closed.  The 15,000-strong protest is demanding better working conditions in the Queensland heat, after construction worker Daniel Talolua Sa'u died last December, after showing symptoms of heat stress.  Workers are calling for the resignation of the Minister for Industrial Relations, Grace Grace, as well as a more effective heat stress code practice for outdoor and high-risk work.

No problem! Here’s the information about the Mercedes CLR GTR:

The Mercedes CLR GTR is a remarkable racing car celebrated for its outstanding performance and sleek design. Powered by a potent 6.0-liter V12 engine, it delivers over 600 horsepower. 🔧

Acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h takes approximately 3.7 seconds, with a remarkable top speed surpassing 320 km/h. 🥇

Incorporating advanced aerodynamic features and cutting-edge stability technologies, the CLR GTR ensures exceptional stability and control, particularly during high-speed maneuvers. 💨

Originally priced around $1.5 million, the Mercedes CLR GTR is considered one of the most exclusive and prestigious racing cars ever produced. 💰

Its limited production run of just five units adds to its rarity, making it highly sought after by racing enthusiasts and collectors worldwide. 🌎

No problem! Here’s some information about David Goggins and his extraordinary journey:

David Goggins is a world-renowned endurance athlete, former Navy SEAL, and motivational speaker who has become a symbol of resilience and mental toughness. Known for his “stay hard” mentality, Goggins inspires millions to push past their limits and embrace discomfort. 🏃‍♂️

From completing ultramarathons and Ironman races to setting a world record for pull-ups, Goggins has proven that the human body can endure almost anything with the right mindset. His bestselling memoir, Can’t Hurt Me, shares his story of overcoming adversity and teaches others how to unlock their full potential. 💪

Whether he’s running 100 miles or motivating others to crush their excuses, Goggins continues to redefine what’s possible. 🌟
